title: About
content:
About

Wilson Ceramics is a one-person pottery studio in Charleston, West Virginia, run by James Avery Wilson. James makes cone-6 satin-matte, earth-tone work, teaches wheel-throwing and handbuilding classes, and is an adjunct ceramics instructor at the University of Charleston.

title: Contact
content:
Contact

Wilson Ceramics, 208 Capitol Street, Charleston, WV 25301. Email james.wilson@gmail.com for class registration, commissions, and studio visits.

title: Pricing
content:
Pricing

Six-week wheel-throwing and handbuilding class series, open studio time, and custom commission work. Commission quotes are available on request.
